meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing & Debugging: Advanced Guide for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Master SaaS pricing and resolve complex debugging bottlenecks. Learn how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to ship high-value software faster than ever.
content.answer_block: Debugging bottlenecks often stem from poorly architected pricing logic that complicates state management. By decoupling your pricing engine into a modular, event-driven service using Claude Code for automated refactoring and Antigravity for architectural visualization, you can eliminate technical debt, stabilize revenue logic, and slash your development time by 60%.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your client’s launch is in 48 hours, and your pricing logic is a black box of unreadable, brittle code. You’re trapped in a cycle of 'fix one bug, break two others,' watching your margins evaporate into hours of unpaid maintenance. This isn't just a coding error; it's a structural failure that threatens your reputation as a high-end freelancer.

But what if you could treat your pricing engine like a precision instrument? By integrating Antigravity for structural clarity and Claude Code for intent-driven refactoring, you shift from manual debugging to automated orchestration. This tutorial is your blueprint for building a bulletproof, high-revenue SaaS architecture that pays for itself in billable hours saved.

steps.title: Architectural Audit with Antigravity
steps.description: Map your existing pricing service to identify tight coupling. Visualization reveals the hidden complexity causing your debugging loops.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this pricing module. Generate a dependency graph identifying circular references and high-cyclomatic complexity nodes that impede debugging.

steps.title: Decoupling Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Extract pricing business rules from the main controller into a standalone, testable service to isolate debugging surface area.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current pricing controller into a strategy pattern. Ensure logic is isolated from UI and DB layers for easier unit testing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Refactor ./src/pricing/controller.ts into a strategy pattern and move core calculations to a new service file.'

steps.title: Automating Test Coverage
steps.description: Generate edge-case tests for every pricing tier and discount scenario to ensure no regression occurs during future iterations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite for the pricing service covering edge cases like pro-rated upgrades, tax calculation failures, and coupon stacking.

steps.title: Implementing Observability Hooks
steps.description: Inject structured logging into the pricing engine to catch runtime anomalies before they reach production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add structured logging to all pricing transaction methods, capturing input parameters, state transitions, and final output.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Add Winston logging to all functions in ./services/pricing/engine.ts'

steps.title: Continuous Validation Pipeline
steps.description: Set up a CLI-driven validation check that runs before every commit to ensure pricing integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a pre-commit hook script that validates the pricing schema against a JSON-schema definition to prevent invalid state.

pro_tips: Always treat pricing logic as an immutable state machine to prevent race conditions during checkout.
Use Claude Code to document your legacy code's 'intent' as you refactor; it acts as a permanent technical debt reduction tool.
Never hardcode tax rates or currency conversion factors; fetch these via a cached external provider to simplify your codebase.
If your debugging time exceeds 20% of your build time, your abstractions are too leaky—refactor immediately.
Leverage Antigravity to generate visual documentation for clients; it builds immense trust and justifies higher project rates.
content.next_steps: After stabilizing your pricing module, integrate a feature-flag system to allow for A/B testing your pricing tiers without deploying new code.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start scaling your freelance business with a professional, automated workflow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
